title: Bostik All Purpose 50ml - Ultra Strong - Fast Setting - Clear Glue for Minor Household Repairs
features: An ultra strong, fast setting, clear adhesive for general household, craft and office use
Non-staining and virtually colourless, Clean to use
Typical uses: handbags, luggage, lampshades, picture frames, upholstery, jewellery, books, china and marquetry pieces
Contents: 1x Bostik All Purpose Adhesive, Colour: Clear, 50ml
description: From the manufacturer Bostik All Purpose Clear Glue Clear, multipurpose glue for minor household repairs Bostik All Purpose Clear Glue is an ultra strong, fast setting, solvented adhesive. It sticks a range of materials, including ceramics, fabrics, plastics, metal, paper, wood, glass and more! Perfect for general household, craft and office use. Suitable materials Bostik All Purpose Clear Glue bonds a wide variety of materials including metals, wood, glass, china, leather, felt, canvas, paper, cardboard, certain fabrics, PVC and various other plastics. Advantages at a glance Ultra strong and fast setting general purpose adhesive Long lasting bond Suitable for use on most materials Virtually colourless and non staining Bonds within 10 minutes, fully set in a few hours Bonds metals, wood, glass, china, leather, felt, canvas, paper, cardboard, fabrics and more Colour: Clear 50ml tube Bostik All Purpose Clear Glue Bostik Leather Repair Clear Glue EVO-STIK Wood Glue -
